sources.title: The Merchant of Venice by William Shakespeare
sources.rightsBasis: Underlying work is public domain in the UK; Project Gutenberg plain-text edition; only short attributed excerpts are retained.

evidence.locator: Act 1, Scene 3; Bassanio asks for the loan
evidence.anchor: Three thousand ducats for three months, and Antonio bound.

evidence.locator: Act 1, Scene 3; Antonio accepts Shylock’s bond
evidence.anchor: Yes, Shylock, I will seal unto this bond.

evidence.locator: Act 2, Scene 8; Shylock learns Jessica fled
evidence.anchor: My daughter! O my ducats! O my daughter! Fled with a Christian!

evidence.locator: Act 3, Scene 2; Bassanio chooses the lead casket
Act 3, Scene 2; Antonio’s letter reaches Bassanio
evidence.anchor: my ships have all miscarried, my creditors grow cruel, my estate is very low, my bond to the Jew is forfeit

evidence.locator: Act 5, Scene 1; Portia reveals the ring trick
evidence.anchor: I had it of him: pardon me, Bassanio, For by this ring, the doctor lay with me.
In sooth I know not why I am so sad,
evidence.requiredAnswer: In sooth I know not why I am so sad,

evidence.locator: Act 2, Scene 7; the gold casket scroll
evidence.anchor: All that glisters is not gold,
evidence.requiredAnswer: All that glisters is not gold,

evidence.locator: Act 1, Scene 1; Antonio describes the world
evidence.anchor: I hold the world but as the world, Gratiano,
evidence.requiredAnswer: I hold the world but as the world, Gratiano,

evidence.locator: Act 1, Scene 3; Antonio judges Shylock’s argument
evidence.anchor: The devil can cite Scripture for his purpose.
evidence.requiredAnswer: The devil can cite Scripture for his purpose.

evidence.locator: Act 1, Scene 2; Portia on advice and action
evidence.anchor: If to do were as easy as to know what were good to do
evidence.requiredAnswer: If to do were as easy as to know what were good to do

evidence.locator: Act 5, Scene 1; Portia sees the candle
evidence.anchor: How far that little candle throws his beams!
evidence.requiredAnswer: How far that little candle throws his beams!
